title: Meitei (Manipuri) practice session – prepositions

rows: The book is on the table.

ꯕꯣꯜ ꯑꯁꯤ ꯐꯝꯐꯝ ꯑꯅꯤꯒꯤ ꯃꯔꯛꯇ ꯂꯩꯔꯤ꯫
bol asi phampham anigi marakta leiri.
I am going to the market.

title: Meitei (Manipuri) jokes – Learn Meitei (Manipuri) in a fun way

blocks.heading: Meitei jokes – Learn in a fun way
rows: Why did the chicken cross the road?
To get to the other side!
What is faster, hot or cold?
ꯈ꯭ꯋꯥꯏꯗꯒꯤ ꯊꯨꯟꯕ ꯀꯔꯤꯅꯣ, ꯑꯁꯥꯕ ꯅꯠꯔꯒ ꯑꯏꯡꯕ?
khwaaidagi thunba karino, asaaba natraga aingba?
Hot, because you can catch cold!
Why is six afraid of seven?
What did one wall say to the other?
I will meet you at the corner!
My brother talks in his sleep.
That is okay, he never talks when awake!
ꯃꯁꯤ ꯐꯖꯩ, ꯊꯥꯎꯈꯤꯕ ꯃꯇꯝꯗ ꯀꯩꯗꯧꯡꯗ ꯋꯥ ꯉꯥꯡꯗꯦ!
masi phajei, thaaukhiba matamda keidoungda waa ngaangde!

blocks.heading: Daily reading – jokes, thoughts, quotes
rows: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
ꯃꯊꯧ ꯇꯥꯕ ꯃꯇꯝꯒꯤ ꯃꯔꯨꯞ ꯑꯁꯤ ꯑꯆꯨꯝꯕ ꯃꯔꯨꯞꯅꯤ꯫
mathou taaba matamgi marup asi achumba marupni.
The early bird catches the worm.
ꯑꯆꯨꯝꯕ ꯑꯣꯏꯕ ꯑꯁꯤ ꯈ꯭ꯋꯥꯏꯗꯒꯤ ꯐꯕ ꯂꯝꯕꯤꯅꯤ꯫
achumba oiba asi khwaaidagi phaba lambini.
Every day is a new beginning.
Where there is a will, there is a way.
Smile and the world smiles with you.
ꯑꯆꯧꯕ ꯃꯡ ꯃꯥꯡꯕꯤꯌꯨ, ꯍꯣꯠꯅ ꯊꯧꯔꯝ ꯇꯧꯕꯤꯌꯨ꯫
achouba mang maangbiyu, hotna thouram toubiyu.

blocks.heading: Experience with Social Media
rows: I use social media every day.

ei sosiyal midiyaa numit khuding sijinnai.
ꯑꯩ ꯉꯁꯤ ꯐꯣꯇꯣ ꯑꯃ ꯄꯣꯁ꯭ꯠ ꯇꯧꯈꯤ꯫
ei ngasi photo ama post toukhi.
How many likes did you get?

ꯑꯩ ꯑꯣꯟꯂꯥꯏꯟꯗ ꯃꯔꯨꯞ ꯑꯍꯥꯟꯕ ꯑꯃ ꯁꯦꯝꯈꯤ꯫
ei onlaainda marup ahaanba ama semkhi.

ꯑꯩ ꯃꯤꯑꯣꯏꯒ ꯎꯅꯅ ꯋꯥ ꯉꯥꯡꯕ ꯅꯨꯡꯁꯤ꯫
ei mioiga unana waa ngaangba nungsi.

title: Conversation about the eclipse in Meitei (Manipuri)

blocks.heading: Conversation about the eclipse
rows: There is a solar eclipse today.
Do not look at the sun directly.
The eclipse lasts a few minutes.
A lunar eclipse happens at night.
I took a photo of the eclipse.
The next eclipse is in December.
I am excited to see one.
